title: Navigation and News Refresh Shipped
description: Kreativ WP navigation, footer, and news structure have been refreshed.
metaDescription: A website update covering navigation cleanup, footer branding, and a more structured news flow for Kreativ WP.
intro: We introduced streamlined navigation, clearer footer branding, and a structured news publishing flow.

items.title: Navigation cleaned up
items.body: The main header now uses a simpler centered navigation structure with direct access to Home, News, About, and Contact.

items.title: News became a real section
items.body: Instead of placeholder copy, the site now has a dedicated News page and separate update pages for roadmap and release notes.

items.title: Branding tightened
items.body: Footer links and supporting brand references were aligned with the wider KREATIV ecosystem for clearer positioning.
